name: Trenostruzzo Turbo 4000
lore:
Lore of Trenostruzzo Turbo 4000
                                    


Trenostruzzo Turbo 4000 is Trenostruzzo Turbo 3000's alter ego also he is this futuristic train with an ostrich head with a toilet on top of him as a seat. He also lives in a futuristic world.
Lyrics
Italian (Original)
Trenostruzzo turbo 4000! 4000 Lampeggia e galoppa con testa d'anatra che il vento sviluppa che brilla tra torri ponti astrali.
English (Translated)
Ostrich train turbo 4000! 4000 Flashes and gallops with duck head that the wind develops that shines between towers astral bridges.
